3283660.name: SporeBloom Demo
3283660.description:
Engage in Asynchronous Turn-Based Strategy!

Claim the map and cultivate fantastical mushrooms. Compete for dominance with whatever spores fly your way. Each tasty world (according to fungi) features a dynamic ecosystem of wind, events, resources and climate.

Sample BeanStripe or BubbleFins

Each has its own niche; passives, activated abilities and family of Blooms to equip. BeanStripe is an avid Networker whereas BubbleFins is a Propagation master!

DEMO Features:

  • Campaign: first 3 missions

  • Multiplayer with Steam friends

  • Solo vs. CPU opponents (or mix and match)

  • Unlock and Personalize your build

  • Configure your Mushroom Avatar (companion)

  • Dynamic map generation and climate events

  • Mycology glossary lab, and more.

*Note, Online Matchmaking (vs. unknown players) NOT available. Invitation lobbies only.

Progression System (Research)

  • Each playable Spore has secrets to unlock in its own mycelium tree

  • Spend your match earnings to access new Blooms, Mycology glossary entries and cosmetics.

Campaign - Meet the Ancients

Engage with the ‘Ancients’ in missions for knowledge. From a micro perspective, uncover maps via a distinct fog-of-war style exploration. Solve ecological challenges all the while trying to thrive on the Rainforest Stump biome. 

Multiplayer Mode

  • Challenge friends and the Computer (2-3 player matches) 

  • Thoughtful asynchronous turn mechanics provide frequent surprise

  • Maps utilize procedural features fostering innovative puzzle-like challenges; varied shapes, resources, special tiles, and dynamic events keep things fresh

  • Strategy: Spread efficient networks, concentrate on mushroom cultivation, or withhold the territory to hinder the opposition!

Show off your favorite Spores with companion cosmetics!

Collect and swap Skins, Caps, and Spore Staves!

Procedurally generated maps for varied gameplay

  • Maps utilize procedural generation to foster innovative puzzle-like challenges, including varied shapes, resources, special tiles, and dynamic events.

  • Develop extensive underground networks or concentrate on efficient mushroom cultivation and abilities!

Inspired by real-world mycology and ecosystems

Developed by solo indie developer and mycology enthusiast Jake Collinge, the mechanics are inspired by real mushroom ecology:

  • Eat detritus ‘waste’ material

  • Parasitize opponent mushrooms

  • Grow above and below ground

  • Seek out Humus, Nitrogen and other resources

  • React to the environment: wind direction, humidity and soil quality

  • Defend your underground territory

  • Cut off opponent resources

  • …and much more

----- Full Game Feature Inclusions -----

More everything!

  • Campaign worlds with challenges

  • Map shapes and sizes

  • Spores and Blooms (expect parasites, toxins, puffballs!)

  • World locations

  • Spore specific unlock trees

  • Tons of glossary entries

  • Full cosmetic sets
